pr_text:
## Title: Fix PUSCH power control by removing hardcoded delta_pusch override

### Summary
The UE's PUSCH power control was incorrectly forced to zero due to a workaround that overrode the calculated power adjustment value. This caused incorrect transmit power levels regardless of TPC commands in DCI. The workaround (`delta_pusch = 0`) was originally added because the PHY layer was not applying PUSCH TX power correctly. With the PHY issue now resolved, this override prevents proper closed-loop po
